ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sir_cost_details" (
  "sir_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the Standard Investment Report */,
  "cost_id" INTEGER /* Primary key to identify this cost detail item */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cost category */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the investment project */,
  "cost_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the cost */,
  "budget_amount" REAL /* Budgeted amount for the cost */,
  "actual_amount" REAL /* Actual amount spent */,
  "variance_amount" REAL /* Variance between budgeted and actual amounts */,
  "forecast_amount" REAL /* Forecasted amount for future spending */,
  "py_spending" REAL /* Spending in the Prior Year (PY) on the reported capability */,
  "cy_spending" REAL /* Spending in the Current Year (CY) on the reported capability */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Approval status of the cost (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* User who approved the cost */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date of approval */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sir_cost_details_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sir_cost_details_sir_id FOREIGN KEY ("sir_id") REFERENCES standard_investment_reports ("sir_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sir_cost_details_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES cost_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "standard_investment_reports" (
  "sir_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each SIR */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the investment project */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the SIR */,
  "report_year" TEXT /* Year the report pertains to */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the report was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the SIR (e.g., draft, submitted, approved) */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* User who approved the SIR */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date of approval */,
  "review_comments" TEXT /* Review comments or feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sir_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standard_investment_reports_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standard_investment_reports_report_year FOREIGN KEY ("report_year") REFERENCES financial_years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cost_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (for hierarchical structure) */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the cost category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cost category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the category */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the category was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the category */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cost_categories_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cost_categories_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cost_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES cost_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial year */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the financial year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the financial year */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the financial year is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "sir_id" INTEGER /* ID of the SIR being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the SIR */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the SIR was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the SIR */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Indicates if the access attempt was successful */,
  "failure_reason" TEXT /* Reason for any failed access attempts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sir_id FOREIGN KEY ("sir_id") REFERENCES standard_investment_reports ("sir_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report submission */,
  "sir_id" INTEGER /* ID of the SIR being submitted */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the submitted report */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the report was submitted */,
  "submitted_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the submission (e.g., draft, submitted, approved) */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* User who approved the submission */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date of approval */,
  "review_comments" TEXT /* Review comments or feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_submissions_submitted_by FOREIGN KEY ("submitted_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_submissions_sir_id FOREIGN KEY ("sir_id") REFERENCES standard_investment_reports ("sir_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_submissions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
